message:
test(collect): add 50 integration tests for container and GPU detection

Covers Docker/Podman/containerd/LXC/K8s cgroup detection, NVIDIA CSV
device+process parsing, ROCm JSON/text/process parsing, GpuSnapshot
helpers, serialization roundtrips, live system detection, and stress
tests for 8-GPU / 100-process scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
